Name a single exemplar vector in SymPortal style

Source: R/name.R
dot-name_exemplar.Rd

/ separates co-dominant sequences (within codominant_ratio of the top); - appends less-abundant associates in descending order, down to min_weight.

Usage

.name_exemplar(
  beta_row,
  codominant_ratio = 0.5,
  min_weight = 0.05,
  max_seqs = 6
)

Arguments

beta_row

Named numeric vector (sequence -> weight), sums to ~1.

codominant_ratio

Sequences whose weight is >= this fraction of the single largest are treated as co-dominant and joined with / (default 0.5).

min_weight

Minimum weight to include a sequence at all (default 0.05).

max_seqs

Maximum sequences in the name (default 6).

Value

A SymPortal-style name string.

On this page
